title: Secrets, Dependencies, Static Analysis, and Supply Chain · Repository Template Mission
summary: A small backend engineering team. The team needs a Python service template with Ruff, strict typing, tests, dependency and secret gates, and clean setup. Planned artifact: Deliver Tested Python Service Template with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose tools with clear ownership and minimal duplicate diagnostics.
Enable the language or checker strict baseline and document intentional deviations.
Assign unit, integration, contract, browser, system, and acceptance tests to distinct risks.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# Risk-profiled repository gate portfolio
# Each gate needs purpose, command, failure fixture, owner, and suppression policy.

steps.title: Extend the cumulative artifact
steps.instruction: Append a gates-dependency-vulnerability-12lxqh: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Dependency Vulnerability into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
gates-dependency-vulnerability-12lxqh:
  verify: [replace with a deterministic check]
  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

steps.title: Defend the stakeholder delivery
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Dependency Vulnerability applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Scan direct and transitive dependencies and triage exploitability and reachability.
